data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your TV.

user.description: Please refer to the documentation to make sure all requirements are met.

notify_connection_error.message: Failed to send notification to {name} due to a connection error

send_message.description: Sends a notification to your Android TV or Fire TV device.

background_color.description: The color of the notification dialog background.
background_color.name: Background color

duration.description: The time the notification remains visible.
duration.name: Duration

fontsize.description: The size of the title and message text.
fontsize.name: Font size

icon.description: The image displayed as the notification icon to the left of the notification text.
icon.name: Icon

image.description: The image displayed above the notification text.
image.name: Image

interactive.description: Interactive mode that enables manual dismissal or expansion for additional details via the remote control.
interactive.name: Interactive

position.description: The screen location where the notification dialog appears.
position.name: Position

transparency.description: The opacity of the background, from 0% (solid) to 100% (invisible).
transparency.name: Transparency

send_message.name: [%key:component::notify::services::send_message::name%]
